pi_items.source: task.json and setup_libreoffice_base.sh explicitly use this path.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require and verify this exact query name.
Task description requires spending > $40.00, and verifier.py explicitly checks for the string '40' in the SQL.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require and verify this exact query name.
Task description requires > 50 tracks, and verifier.py explicitly checks for the string '50' in the SQL.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require and verify this exact form name.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world Chinook sample database downloaded directly from the official GitHub repository, converted to LibreOffice Base format (.odb) at /home/ga/chinook.odb. The exact query names ('VIP_Customers', 'Top_Artists'), form name ('ManagerDashboard'), and specific SQL filtering parameters (>$40 spent and >50 tracks) explicitly match the constraints strictly scored in verifier.py.
